rationale: Guidance specifies concrete technology (Elasticsearch), dataset size (10 million+ documents), performance targets (search results <500ms p95, autocomplete <100ms, 1000 new documents/minute indexing). Acceptance criteria detail specific search scenarios (keyword matching, filtering, autocomplete), relevance ranking (TF-IDF scoring with 3x boost for exact phrases), and spell-correction (1-2 character tolerance). Scalability requirement specified (1000 concurrent searches, 3-node cluster). Token reduction from replacing 'quickly', 'optimize', 'improve ranking' with specific technical metrics and algorithms.
